title: API Gap Entry Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of each spec/api-gaps/*.md file. Validated by scripts/validate-api-gaps.sh.

gap.description: Short kebab-case identifier matching the brief filename (without .md).

status.description: Lifecycle status. Statuses follow the detector emit set + closure states.

detected.description: ISO date when the gap was first identified.

bc3_refs.description: Pointers into the BC3 source/plan that frame the gap.

sdk_demand.description: Editorial estimate of how much SDK consumers need this gap closed.

bc3_pr.description: Reference to the BC3 PR that addressed the gap (when status is addressed-in-bc3-pr-N or absorbed-in-sdk).

smithy_refs.description: Smithy structures/operations that absorbed the contract (when status is absorbed-in-sdk).
